'''ây-j-z-d''' ('''kayajzedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoarse|hoarse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoarse|hoarse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-j-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| kayajzedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyajzedoko|thiyajzedoko]] || [[word:jiyajzedoko|jiyajzedoko]] || [[word:shiyajzedoko|shiyajzedoko]] || [[word:kiyajzedoko|kiyajzedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyajzedoko|thuthuyajzedoko]] || [[word:jujuyajzedoko|jujuyajzedoko]] || [[word:shushuyajzedoko|shushuyajzedoko]] || [[word:kukuyajzedoko|kukuyajzedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyajzedoko|thoyajzedoko]] || [[word:joyajzedoko|joyajzedoko]] || [[word:shoyajzedoko|shoyajzedoko]] || [[word:koyajzedoko|koyajzedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyajzedoko|thĂŠyajzedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyajzedoko|jĂŠyajzedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyajzedoko|shĂŠyajzedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyajzedoko|kĂŠyajzedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayajzedoko|thayajzedoko]] || [[word:jayajzedoko|jayajzedoko]] || [[word:shayajzedoko|shayajzedoko]] || [[word:kayajzedoko|kayajzedoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
